Tests the `toFixed` method of `Number.prototype` with a string argument.

# Purpose
This code is a simple test assertion that checks the behavior of the `toFixed` method on the `Number` prototype in JavaScript. It verifies that calling `toFixed` with the argument `"1"` on a `Number` object returns the string `"0.0"`. This test ensures that the `toFixed` method correctly formats a number to one decimal place, even when the input is a string that can be converted to a number. The code provides narrow functionality, focusing on a specific aspect of the `Number` object's method behavior.
